title: Is Coconut-milk Gluten Free? | BiteRight
description: Public gluten safety analysis for Coconut-milk. See major risks, safer alternatives, and what to ask before ordering.
heading: Is Coconut-milk gluten free?
intro: This public analysis report explains the biggest gluten risks in Coconut-milk and how to order more safely.

verdict.summary: Coconut milk is generally gluten-free, as it is made from coconuts and does not contain gluten-containing grains. However, cross-contamination during processing or preparation can pose a risk.

disclaimer: This guidance is informational only. Always verify ingredients and preparation with the restaurant.

sections.title: Quick answer
sections.body: Coconut-milk can vary by recipe, ingredients, and cross-contact controls in the kitchen.

sections.title: Common gluten risks
sections.body: Watch for hidden sources like soy sauce, malt flavoring, marinades, thickeners, and shared fryers.

sections.title: How BiteRight helps
sections.body: Scan menus and ingredient labels with BiteRight to get a localized gluten-risk breakdown in seconds.

risk: Additives or thickeners that may contain gluten
Shared equipment or utensils used for gluten-containing foods

waiter_script.preview: Is the coconut milk processed in a gluten-free facility?

faq.question: Can BiteRight confirm if Coconut-milk is gluten free?
faq.answer: BiteRight highlights likely gluten risks based on ingredients and preparation. Always confirm with the kitchen if you have coeliac disease.

faq.question: What should I ask a restaurant?
faq.answer: Ask about shared equipment, sauces, marinades, and whether the kitchen has a dedicated gluten-free prep area.
